emails.subject: FW: !!!   OATI Etag 1.7 Minimum Requirements   !!!
emails.body: FW: OATI Etag 1.7 Minimum Requirements Cara, Do you know about this and are we ready for this version? Caroline To: Emmert, Caroline

emails.subject: RE: !!!   OATI Etag 1.7 Minimum Requirements   !!!
emails.body: RE: OATI Etag 1.7 Minimum Requirements yes yes and yes. The certificate stuff can be done at the end of the month when we know more about what is going on. I have all the documents and download stuff to do that

emails.subject: RE: !!!   OATI Etag 1.7 Minimum Requirements   !!!
emails.body: RE: OATI Etag 1.7 Minimum Requirements Fabulous! Thank you. Caroline
